question: What are the school IDs and unique school IDs of all schools affiliated with CBSE board at the secondary level that are managed by the Department of Education, ordered by school ID?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE das ON si.SCHOOL_ID = das.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE das.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' ORDER BY si.SCHOOL_ID;

question: What are the school IDs and categories of all co-educational schools affiliated with CBSE board at the secondary level, ordered by school ID?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE das ON si.SCHOOL_ID = das.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE das.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' AND si.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' ORDER BY si.SCHOOL_ID;

question: What are the school IDs and establishment years of all primary with upper primary, secondary, and higher secondary schools (Classes 1 to 12) affiliated with CBSE, ordered by school ID?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE das ON si.SCHOOL_ID = das.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE das.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' AND si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' ORDER BY si.SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools are affiliated with CBSE board for secondary education and managed by the Department of Education?
sql: WITH cbse_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t2.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE'), govt_managed_schools AS (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education') SELECT s.SCHOOL_ID, s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s WHERE s.SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM cbse_schools) AND s.SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM govt_managed_schools) GROUP BY s.SCHOOL_ID, s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(s.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY s.SCHOOL_ID

question: What are the school IDs, school types, and establishment years of schools that are both affiliated with CBSE board for secondary education and managed by the Department of Education?
sql: WITH cbse_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t2.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE'), govt_managed_schools AS (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education') SELECT s.SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_TYPE, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s WHERE s.SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM cbse_schools) AND s.SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM govt_managed_schools) GROUP BY s.SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_TYPE, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR HAVING COUNT(s.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY s.SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools in India are both affiliated with the CBSE board for secondary education and managed by the Department of Education?
sql: WITH cbse_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t2.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE'), govt_managed_schools AS (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education') SELECT s.SCHOOL_ID, s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s WHERE s.SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM cbse_schools) AND s.SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM govt_managed_schools) GROUP BY s.SCHOOL_ID, s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(s.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY s.SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools are either affiliated with CBSE as their secondary affiliation board or have more than 220 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT das.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID FROM DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE das WHERE das.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' UNION SELECT DISTINCT fsim.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS fsim WHERE fsim.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 220;

question: Which school IDs are either affiliated with CBSE as their secondary affiliation board or have more than 217 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT das.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID FROM DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE das WHERE das.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' UNION SELECT DISTINCT fsim.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS fsim WHERE fsim.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 217;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with CBSE as their secondary affiliation board or have more than 218 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT das.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID FROM DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE das WHERE das.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' UNION SELECT DISTINCT fsim.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS fsim WHERE fsim.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 218;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with CBSE board as their secondary affiliation or have more than 220 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT f.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS f JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE d ON f.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = d.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE d.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' UNION SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS WHERE INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 220;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with CBSE board as their secondary affiliation in 2018, or have more than 217 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT f.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS f JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE d ON f.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = d.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE d.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' AND f.YEAR = '2018' UNION SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS WHERE INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 217;

question: Which schools are affiliated with CBSE board and offer up to Class 12, or have more than 218 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT f.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS f JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE d ON f.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = d.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE d.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' AND d.HIGHEST_CLASS = '12 - Class12' UNION SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS WHERE INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 218;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with the CBSE board or have more than 220 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT f.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS f JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE a ON f.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = a.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE a.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' OR f.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 220;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with the CBSE board or have more than 217 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT f.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS f JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE a ON f.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = a.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE a.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' OR f.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 217;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with CBSE board or have more than 218 primary instructional days?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT f.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS f JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE a ON f.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = a.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE a.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE' OR f.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 218;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with CBSE secondary board or have more than 210 primary instructional days? List their school IDs in ascending order.
sql: WITH cte_affiliation AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID AS col_0 FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS t1 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t1.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t2.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE'), cte_instruction AS (SELECT t3.SCHOOL_ID AS col_0 FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS t3 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t3.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t3.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 210 GROUP BY t3.SCHOOL_ID HAVING MAX(t3.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY) > 210) SELECT col_0 FROM cte_affiliation UNION SELECT col_0 FROM cte_instruction ORDER BY col_0;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with CBSE secondary board or have more than 217 primary instructional days? List their school IDs in ascending order.
sql: WITH cte_affiliation AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID AS col_0 FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS t1 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t1.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t2.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE'), cte_instruction AS (SELECT t3.SCHOOL_ID AS col_0 FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS t3 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t3.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t3.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 217 GROUP BY t3.SCHOOL_ID HAVING MAX(t3.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY) > 217) SELECT col_0 FROM cte_affiliation UNION SELECT col_0 FROM cte_instruction ORDER BY col_0;

question: Which schools are either affiliated with CBSE (secondary affiliation board) or have had more than 212 primary instructional days, listed in order by school ID?
sql: WITH cte_affiliation AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID AS col_0 FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS t1 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t1.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t2.AFFILIATION_BOARD_SECONDARY = '1 - CBSE'), cte_instruction AS (SELECT t3.SCHOOL_ID AS col_0 FROM FACT_STUDENT_INSTRUCTION_METRICS t3 JOIN DIM_ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE t2 ON t3.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID = t2.ACADEMIC_STRUCTURE_ID WHERE t3.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY > 212 GROUP BY t3.SCHOOL_ID HAVING MAX(t3.INSTRUCTIONAL_DAYS_PRIMARY) > 212) SELECT col_0 FROM cte_affiliation UNION SELECT col_0 FROM cte_instruction ORDER BY col_0;

question: What are the residential school types, road accessibility, and special needs availability for schools in India that are residential and provide facilities for children with special needs?
sql: SELECT RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the residential school types and their details for schools that are both residential and approachable by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes';

question: Which residential schools in India have special needs facilities for children, and what are their types and accessibility by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT OPERATIONS_ID, RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes';

question: Which schools in India are residential and have special needs facilities for children, and what are their unique school IDs, residential school types, and accessibility by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the school categories and residential school types for schools that are both residential and approachable by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes';

question: What is the management type, residential school type, and road accessibility of schools that have special needs facilities for children and are residential schools?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes';

question: Which residential schools have facilities for children with special needs, and can they be accessed by all-weather roads? Please list their unique school IDs, residential school types, road accessibility, and special needs availability, sorted by residential school type.
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE;

question: What are the unique school IDs, residential school types, and special needs availability for residential schools that are accessible by all-weather roads, ordered by residential school type?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE;

question: What are the school categories, residential school types, and road accessibility details for residential schools in India that have special needs facilities available for children, ordered by residential school type?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE;

question: Which residential schools that provide special needs facilities for children can be found across different states in India, and what are their school types, all-weather road accessibility, and locations?
sql: WITH residential_schools AS ( SELECT op.OPERATIONS_ID, op.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, op.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, id.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS op JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY id ON op.OPERATIONS_ID = id.SCHOOL_ID WHERE op.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND op.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' ) SELECT cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, cs.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, cs.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, loc.SCHOOL_LOCATION, geo.STATE FROM residential_schools cs JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS loc ON cs.OPERATIONS_ID = loc.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY geo ON loc.LOCATION_ID = geo.POLITICAL_GEO_ID GROUP BY cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, cs.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, cs.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, loc.SCHOOL_LOCATION, geo.STATE HAVING COUNT(cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY geo.STATE, cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID

question: Which residential schools that provide special needs facilities can be found across different districts in India, and what are their school types, all-weather road accessibility, and location details?
sql: WITH residential_schools AS ( SELECT op.OPERATIONS_ID, op.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, op.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, id.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS op JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY id ON op.OPERATIONS_ID = id.SCHOOL_ID WHERE op.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND op.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' ) SELECT cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, cs.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, cs.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, loc.SCHOOL_LOCATION, geo.DISTRICT FROM residential_schools cs JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS loc ON cs.OPERATIONS_ID = loc.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY geo ON loc.LOCATION_ID = geo.POLITICAL_GEO_ID GROUP BY cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, cs.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, cs.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, loc.SCHOOL_LOCATION, geo.DISTRICT HAVING COUNT(cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY geo.DISTRICT, cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID

question: Which residential schools that have special needs facilities are accessible by all-weather roads, and what are their school IDs, residential school types, Gram Panchayat names, and Assembly Constituency names, ordered by constituency and school ID?
sql: WITH residential_schools AS ( SELECT op.OPERATIONS_ID, op.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, op.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, id.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS op JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY id ON op.OPERATIONS_ID = id.SCHOOL_ID WHERE op.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND op.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' ) SELECT cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, cs.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, cs.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, loc.GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME, geo.ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME FROM residential_schools cs JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS loc ON cs.OPERATIONS_ID = loc.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY geo ON loc.LOCATION_ID = geo.POLITICAL_GEO_ID GROUP BY cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, cs.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, cs.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, loc.GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME, geo.ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME HAVING COUNT(cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY geo.ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME, cs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID

question: How many schools with a second medium of instruction are there for each combination of school management type and school category, where more than one such school exists?
sql: SELECT s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID WHERE m.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

question: Which combinations of school management type and school category have more than 2 schools that offer a third medium of instruction, and how many schools are there in each combination?
sql: SELECT s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID WHERE m.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 2;

question: How many schools offer a fourth medium of instruction, broken down by school management type and school category?
sql: SELECT s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID WHERE m.FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

question: How many schools with a second medium of instruction are there, broken down by management type and school category?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM dim ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dim.MEDIUM_ID WHERE dim.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: How many schools offer a third medium of instruction, broken down by school management type and school category?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM dim ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dim.MEDIUM_ID WHERE dim.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: How many schools offer a fourth medium of instruction, broken down by their management type and school category?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM dim ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dim.MEDIUM_ID WHERE dim.FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: How many schools with a second medium of instruction (excluding 'Not Available') are there for each combination of school management type and school category, grouped by management type, where more than one school exists in each group?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM dim ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dim.MEDIUM_ID WHERE dim.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available' GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: For schools where the second medium of instruction is English, Tamil, or Hindi, how many schools are there in each combination of management type and school category (showing only combinations with more than 2 schools), ordered by management type?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM dim ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dim.MEDIUM_ID WHERE dim.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('19 - English', '16 - Tamil', '4 - Hindi') GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: How many schools managed by the Department of Education, grouped by school category, have a third medium of instruction available, considering only categories with more than one such school?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM dim ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dim.MEDIUM_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dim.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available' GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: Which school management types and school categories have more than one school that offers instruction in multiple languages (with a second medium of instruction available), and how many such schools are there in each group?
sql: WITH school_multilingual AS (SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID JOIN (SELECT MEDIUM_ID FROM DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM WHERE SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available') sub ON t2.MEDIUM_ID = sub.MEDIUM_ID GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) > 1) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, school_count FROM school_multilingual ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: How many schools offer instruction in at least three languages, broken down by management type and school category?
sql: WITH school_multilingual AS (SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID JOIN (SELECT MEDIUM_ID FROM DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM WHERE THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available') sub ON t2.MEDIUM_ID = sub.MEDIUM_ID GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) > 0) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, school_count FROM school_multilingual ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: How many schools offer instruction in at least three languages (having both a second and third medium of instruction), broken down by school management type and school category?
sql: WITH school_multilingual AS (SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID JOIN (SELECT MEDIUM_ID FROM DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM WHERE SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available' AND THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available') sub ON t2.MEDIUM_ID = sub.MEDIUM_ID GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) > 0) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, school_count FROM school_multilingual ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools managed by the Department of Education that are residential and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the school categories of Department of Education managed schools that are residential and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the establishment years of schools managed by the Department of Education that are residential and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the establishment years of schools managed by the Department of Education that are residential and have special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: How many schools managed by the Department of Education offer both residential facilities and special needs support for children?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL

question: How many schools of each category are managed by the Department of Education and provide both residential facilities and special needs support for children?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY

question: How many schools of each type are managed by the Department of Education that offer both residential facilities and special needs support for children?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_TYPE, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_TYPE

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education that are residential have address records, and how many address entries does each school have? List them from highest to lowest count.
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes') SELECT fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, fs.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM filtered_schools fs JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON fs.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, fs.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN fs.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY total_count DESC;

question: Which Department of Education managed schools that offer special needs facilities and include classes from 1 to 12 (Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary) have associated location addresses, and how many location records does each such school have, sorted from highest to lowest count?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, fs.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM filtered_schools fs JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON fs.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, fs.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN fs.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY total_count DESC;

question: Which co-educational, residential schools managed by the Department of Education have location addresses, and how many address records does each school have? List them in descending order of address count.
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_TYPE FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes') SELECT fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, fs.SCHOOL_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM filtered_schools fs JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON fs.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, fs.SCHOOL_TYPE HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN fs.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY total_count DESC;

question: What are the unique school IDs along with their first and second medium of instruction, ordered by the primary medium of instruction and establishment year?
sql: SELECT s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, m.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID ORDER BY m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: What are the management types of schools along with their first and third mediums of instruction, sorted by the first medium of instruction and establishment year in ascending order?
sql: SELECT s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, m.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID ORDER BY m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: What are the school categories along with their first and fourth medium of instruction, sorted by the first medium of instruction and establishment year in ascending order?
sql: SELECT s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, m.FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID ORDER BY m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: What are the unique school IDs, establishment years, and all three mediums of instruction for each school, sorted first by the primary medium of instruction and then by the year the school was established?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID ORDER BY im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education, what are their establishment years along with their first, second, and fourth mediums of instruction, sorted by the first medium of instruction and establishment year?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' ORDER BY im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: What are the school categories, establishment years, and mediums of instruction (first, second, and third) for schools where the primary medium of instruction is English, Bengali, or Hindi, sorted by the first medium of instruction and establishment year?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('19 - English', '2 - Bengali', '4 - Hindi') ORDER BY im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: For schools established in 1958 or later, what are their school IDs, establishment years, management types, and first and second mediums of instruction, sorted by the first medium of instruction and establishment year?
sql: SELECT s.SCHOOL_ID, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, m.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID WHERE s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR >= '1958' ORDER BY m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: For all schools established in 1961 or later, what are their school IDs, establishment years, school types, and their first and third mediums of instruction, sorted by the first medium of instruction and establishment year in ascending order?
sql: SELECT s.SCHOOL_ID, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, s.SCHOOL_TYPE, m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, m.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID WHERE s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR >= '1961' ORDER BY m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: For schools established in 1964 or later, what are their school IDs, establishment years, school categories, and their first and fourth mediums of instruction, sorted by the first medium of instruction and establishment year in ascending order?
sql: SELECT s.SCHOOL_ID, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, m.FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM m ON s.SCHOOL_ID = m.MEDIUM_ID WHERE s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR >= '1964' ORDER BY m.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC

question: For each school with a known establishment year and at least one medium of instruction, can you provide the school's details including its management type, all mediums of instruction, location, and Gram Panchayat name, along with the total number of schools under the same management type, sorted by the first medium of instruction and establishment year?
sql: WITH school_medium_details AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, la.SCHOOL_LOCATION, la.GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON im.MEDIUM_ID = la.LOCATION_ID WHERE si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SCHOOL_LOCATION, GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL) AS schools_per_management FROM school_medium_details GROUP BY SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SCHOOL_LOCATION, GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education with a known establishment year and at least one medium of instruction, what are the details of each school including their school ID, establishment year, category, all mediums of instruction, location, and city, along with the total count of schools sharing the same primary medium of instruction, ordered by primary medium of instruction and establishment year?
sql: WITH school_medium_details AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, la.SCHOOL_LOCATION, la.CITY_NAME FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON im.MEDIUM_ID = la.LOCATION_ID WHERE si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education') SELECT SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SCHOOL_LOCATION, CITY_NAME, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION) AS schools_per_medium FROM school_medium_details GROUP BY SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SCHOOL_LOCATION, CITY_NAME HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: For all rural schools in India with a known establishment year and at least one medium of instruction, what are the details of each school including their school type, all mediums of instruction, gram panchayat name, and how many schools share the same primary medium of instruction? Please sort the results by primary medium of instruction and establishment year.
sql: WITH school_medium_details AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_TYPE, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, im.FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, la.SCHOOL_LOCATION, la.GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON im.MEDIUM_ID = la.LOCATION_ID WHERE si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND la.SCHOOL_LOCATION = '1 - Rural') SELECT SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, SCHOOL_TYPE, FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SCHOOL_LOCATION, GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION) AS schools_per_medium FROM school_medium_details GROUP BY SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, SCHOOL_TYPE, FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, FOURTH_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, SCHOOL_LOCATION, GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION ASC, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: What are the top 5 school management types for co-educational schools, ranked by the most recent establishment year?
sql: SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS MAX_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY MAX_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 school management types with the most recently established primary with upper primary, secondary, and higher secondary schools (Classes 1 to 12), along with their latest establishment year?
sql: SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS LATEST_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY LATEST_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the most recent establishment year for schools managed by the Department of Education?
sql: SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS RECENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY RECENT_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 school management types in India based on the most recently established schools, along with their latest establishment year?
sql: SELECT s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS LATEST_ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY p ON s.SCHOOL_ID = p.POLITICAL_GEO_ID WHERE p.COUNTRY = 'India' GROUP BY s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY LATEST_ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 school management types in Andhra Pradesh based on the most recently established schools, along with their latest establishment years?
sql: SELECT s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS MAX_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY p ON s.SCHOOL_ID = p.POLITICAL_GEO_ID WHERE p.STATE = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY MAX_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 school management types in Krishna district, ranked by the most recently established schools?
sql: SELECT s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS RECENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY p ON s.SCHOOL_ID = p.POLITICAL_GEO_ID WHERE p.DISTRICT = 'Krishna' GROUP BY s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY RECENT_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 school management types based on the most recently established schools, along with their latest establishment year?
sql: SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS LATEST_ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY LATEST_ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 school types based on the most recently established schools in India, along with the year of their latest establishment?
sql: SELECT SCHOOL_TYPE, MAX(ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS MAX_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY GROUP BY SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY MAX_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 school categories with the most recently established schools in India, along with their latest establishment year?
sql: SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MAX(ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS MOST_RECENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY GROUP BY SCHOOL_CATEGORY ORDER BY MOST_RECENT_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 school management types in India based on the most recently established schools, along with their latest establishment years?
sql: WITH management_ranked AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS latest_year FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON si.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY pg ON la.LOCATION_ID = pg.POLITICAL_GEO_ID WHERE pg.COUNTRY = 'India' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, latest_year FROM management_ranked ORDER BY latest_year DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 5 school management types in Andhra Pradesh based on the most recently established schools, along with their latest establishment years?
sql: WITH management_ranked AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS latest_year FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON si.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY pg ON la.LOCATION_ID = pg.POLITICAL_GEO_ID WHERE pg.STATE = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, latest_year FROM management_ranked ORDER BY latest_year DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the top 5 school management types in Andaman and Nicobar Islands based on the most recently established schools under each management type?
sql: WITH management_ranked AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MAX(si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR) AS latest_year FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON si.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY pg ON la.LOCATION_ID = pg.POLITICAL_GEO_ID WHERE pg.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, latest_year FROM management_ranked ORDER BY latest_year DESC LIMIT 5

question: What are the management type, school category, and first medium of instruction for schools that are residential, accessible by all-weather roads, and teach primarily in Hindi or English?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '19 - English');

question: What are the management type, school category, and first medium of instruction for schools that are accessible by all-weather roads, are residential, and use either English or Hindi as their first medium of instruction?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('19 - English', '4 - Hindi');

question: What are the management type, school category, and first medium of instruction for schools that are residential, accessible by all-weather roads, and use either Hindi or Bengali as their primary medium of instruction?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '2 - Bengali');

question: What are the management type, school category, and first medium of instruction for residential schools that are accessible by all-weather roads and use either Hindi or English as their primary medium of instruction?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '19 - English');

question: What are the school categories, management types, and first medium of instruction for schools that are accessible by all-weather roads, are residential, and use either English or Hindi as their primary medium of instruction?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('19 - English', '4 - Hindi');

question: What are the unique school IDs, school categories, and first medium of instruction for residential schools that are accessible by all-weather roads and teach primarily in Hindi or English?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '19 - English');

question: How many residential schools accessible by all-weather roads, grouped by management type, school category, and first medium of instruction (Hindi or English), are there in India?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '19 - English') GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION

question: How many residential schools accessible by all-weather roads use English or Bengali as their first medium of instruction, broken down by school type, school category, and medium of instruction?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_TYPE, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('19 - English', '2 - Bengali') GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_TYPE, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION

question: How many residential schools accessible by all-weather roads use Hindi or Bengali as the first medium of instruction, broken down by school management type, school type, and medium of instruction?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_TYPE, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '2 - Bengali') GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_TYPE, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION

question: Which residential schools that are approachable by all-weather roads use Hindi or English as their first medium of instruction, and what are their management types and school categories?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes') SELECT fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, fs.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM filtered_schools fs JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON fs.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '19 - English') GROUP BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, fs.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION HAVING COUNT(fs.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION

question: Which residential schools that are approachable by all-weather roads use Hindi or English as their first medium of instruction, and what are their school types and categories?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_TYPE, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes') SELECT fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.SCHOOL_TYPE, fs.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM filtered_schools fs JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON fs.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '19 - English') GROUP BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.SCHOOL_TYPE, fs.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION HAVING COUNT(fs.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION

question: Which residential schools that are approachable by all-weather roads use Hindi or English as their first medium of instruction, and what is their management type and establishment year?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes') SELECT fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, fs.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION FROM filtered_schools fs JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON fs.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IN ('4 - Hindi', '19 - English') GROUP BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, fs.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, fs.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION HAVING COUNT(fs.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY fs.SCHOOL_ID, im.FIRST_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION

question: What is the management type of schools that are residential but do not have special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN != '1 - Yes';

question: What is the management type of schools that are residential but do not have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE != 'Not Available' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN != '1 - Yes';

question: What is the management type of schools that are residential and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN != '2 - No';

question: How many private residential schools are there under each school management type, where none of the schools provide special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(si.SCHOOL_ID) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Private=3' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question: What are the distinct types of school management for schools that offer a second medium of instruction and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the distinct types of school management for schools that have a third medium of instruction and also provide special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE im.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the distinct types of school management for schools that offer a second medium of instruction but do not have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No';

question: What are the distinct types of school management for schools that have a second medium of instruction and provide special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND t3.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the distinct types of school management for schools that have a second medium of instruction but do not have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND t3.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No';

question: What are the distinct types of minority community management for schools that offer a second medium of instruction and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND t3.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: How many schools with a second medium of instruction exist under each management type, considering only those management types that have at least one school with special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID WHERE t2.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT t1b.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1b JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t3 ON t1b.SCHOOL_ID = t3.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t3.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL

question: For each school management type that has at least one school offering special needs facilities for children, how many schools have a valid second medium of instruction?
sql: SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID WHERE t2.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND t2.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available' AND t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT t1b.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1b JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t3 ON t1b.SCHOOL_ID = t3.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t3.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL

question: For each school management type that has at least one school without special needs facilities for children, how many schools offer a second medium of instruction?
sql: SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.MEDIUM_ID WHERE t2.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT t1b.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1b JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t3 ON t1b.SCHOOL_ID = t3.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t3.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No') GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL

question: Which school management types have more than one school that offers multilingual instruction (with a second medium of instruction available) AND also provide special needs facilities for children with special needs (CWSN)?
sql: WITH col_0_multilingual AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT si.SCHOOL_ID) > 1 ), col_0_cwsn AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ) SELECT m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM col_0_multilingual m INNER JOIN col_0_cwsn c ON m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = c.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ASC

question: Which school management types have schools that offer a third medium of instruction and also provide special needs facilities for children with special needs (CWSN)?
sql: WITH col_0_multilingual AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE im.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND im.THIRD_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT si.SCHOOL_ID) > 0 ), col_0_cwsn AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ) SELECT m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM col_0_multilingual m INNER JOIN col_0_cwsn c ON m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = c.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ASC

question: Which school management types have more than 2 schools offering multilingual instruction (with a second medium of instruction available) and also have schools that do not provide special needs facilities for children with special needs (CWSN)?
sql: WITH col_0_multilingual AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_INSTRUCTION_MEDIUM im ON si.SCHOOL_ID = im.MEDIUM_ID WHERE im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION IS NOT NULL AND im.SECOND_MEDIUM_OF_INSTRUCTION != 'Not Available' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT si.SCHOOL_ID) > 2 ), col_0_cwsn AS ( SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ) SELECT m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM col_0_multilingual m INNER JOIN col_0_cwsn c ON m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = c.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY m.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ASC

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' UNION SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS ON DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY.SCHOOL_ID = DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes'

question: Which schools are either co-educational or do not have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' UNION SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS ON DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY.SCHOOL_ID = DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No'

question: Which schools are either managed by the Department of Education or have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' UNION SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS ON DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY.SCHOOL_ID = DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes'

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' UNION SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: Which schools are either managed by the Department of Education or do not have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' UNION SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No';

question: Which schools in India are either co-educational or provide special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' UNION SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools in India that are either not managed by a minority community or have special needs facilities available for children, listed in order?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either managed by the Department of Education or do not have special needs facilities available for children, sorted by their unique school ID?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' OR dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' ORDER BY dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools in India are either not managed by a minority community or do not have special needs facilities available for children? List their unique school IDs in ascending order.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' ORDER BY dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No'), cte_2 AS (SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_1 UNION SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_2 ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools are either managed by the Department of Education or do not have availability of special needs facilities for children? List their unique school IDs in ascending order.
sql: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education'), cte_2 AS (SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No') SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_1 UNION SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_2 ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools are either co-educational or have special needs facilities available for children? Please provide their unique school IDs sorted in order.
sql: WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t1.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational'), cte_2 AS (SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_1 UNION SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_2 ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID

question: For schools that are residential, what are their residential school types and the availability of special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes';

question: For schools that are residential, what are their residential school types, availability of special needs facilities for children, and whether they are used for shifts?
sql: SELECT RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, SCHOOL_USED_FOR_SHIFTS FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the operations ID, residential school type, and availability of special needs facilities for children in schools that are residential?
sql: SELECT OPERATIONS_ID, RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes';

question: Which schools in India are residential, and what are their residential school types and availability of special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes';

question: Which residential schools in India have special needs facilities available for children, and what type of residential school are they?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: Which residential schools of Non-ashram (Govt.) type have special needs facilities for children, and what are their unique school IDs and availability of special needs details?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)';

question: Which residential schools in India have their unique school IDs, residential school types, and availability of special needs facilities for children, sorted by residential school type?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE;

question: Which residential schools in India have special needs facilities available for children, and what type of residential school are they? Please list them sorted by their special needs availability status.
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN;

question: For all residential schools in India, what are their school categories, residential school types, and availability of special needs facilities for children, sorted by residential school type?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE;

question: Which residential schools in India have special needs facilities available for children, and what type of residential school are they? Please list them grouped by residential school type.
sql: WITH residential_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON si.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN HAVING COUNT(si.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM residential_schools ORDER BY RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID ASC

question: Which residential schools in India have special needs facilities available for children, and what type of residential school are they? Please list them sorted by residential school type and unique school ID.
sql: WITH residential_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON si.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN HAVING COUNT(si.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM residential_schools ORDER BY RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID ASC

question: Which residential schools of non-ashram government or private type provide special needs facilities for children, and what is their availability status?
sql: WITH residential_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON si.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', '3 - Private=3') GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN HAVING COUNT(si.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM residential_schools ORDER BY RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID ASC

question: How many schools with special needs facilities are there, broken down by school management type and whether they are residential or non-residential?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL;

question: How many residential schools are there for each type of school management in India?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL;

question: How many schools that do not have special needs facilities for children are there, broken down by school management type and whether they are residential or non-residential?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL;

question: How many schools with special needs facilities are there for each combination of school management type and residential/non-residential status?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL;

question: How many schools, grouped by their management type and residential status, do not have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL;

question: How many schools with special needs facilities are there for each combination of school management type and residential school type in India?
