sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE;

question: How many schools with special needs facilities are there for each combination of school management type and residential status, ordered from highest to lowest count?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL ORDER BY school_count DESC;

question: How many schools that do not have special needs facilities for children are there, broken down by their management type and whether they are residential or non-residential, ordered from highest to lowest count?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL ORDER BY school_count DESC;

question: How many schools with special needs facilities are there for each combination of school management type and residential school type in India, ranked from highest to lowest count?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY school_count DESC;

question: How many schools with special needs facilities are there for each type of school management and residential status in India?
sql: WITH management_special_needs_cte AS ( SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, t2.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN ( SELECT OPERATIONS_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' ) filtered ON t2.OPERATIONS_ID = filtered.OPERATIONS_ID GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, t2.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN HAVING COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) > 0 ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, school_count FROM management_special_needs_cte ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, school_count DESC

question: How many residential schools with special needs facilities are there for each school management type and residential school type in India?
sql: WITH management_special_needs_cte AS ( SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN ( SELECT OPERATIONS_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' ) filtered ON t2.OPERATIONS_ID = filtered.OPERATIONS_ID GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE HAVING COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) > 0 ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, school_count FROM management_special_needs_cte ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE, school_count DESC

question: For non-residential schools that lack special needs facilities for children, how many schools are there by management type and road approachability, and what is their distribution across these categories?
sql: WITH management_special_needs_cte AS ( SELECT t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, t2.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN ( SELECT OPERATIONS_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' AND RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '2 - No' ) filtered ON t2.OPERATIONS_ID = filtered.OPERATIONS_ID GROUP BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, t2.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS HAVING COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) > 0 ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL, APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, school_count FROM management_special_needs_cte ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS, school_count DESC

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools managed by the Department of Education that are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the establishment years of schools managed by the Department of Education that are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the unique school IDs and establishment years of schools managed by the Department of Education that have special needs facilities for children and are accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes';

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education have both all-weather road accessibility and special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_TYPE FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: How many schools under each management type are accessible by all-weather roads and also have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

question: Which school categories have more than one school that both provides special needs facilities for children and is accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

question: How many schools were established each year that are accessible by all-weather roads but do not have special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

question: How many Department of Education managed schools that are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities for children are there, broken down by school category and type?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t1.SCHOOL_TYPE FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND t2.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND t2.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM filtered_schools GROUP BY SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY total_count DESC

question: How many schools managed by the Department of Education, which are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities for children, are there in each school category?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND t2.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND t2.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM filtered_schools GROUP BY SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY total_count DESC

question: How many schools managed by the Department of Education, accessible by all-weather roads, and equipped with special needs facilities are there, grouped by school type and establishment year?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_TYPE, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND t2.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND t2.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT SCHOOL_TYPE, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM filtered_schools GROUP BY SCHOOL_TYPE, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY total_count DESC

question: Can you list all schools with their unique school ID, management type, and establishment year, sorted from the oldest to the most recently established?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: Can you list all schools with their school ID, management type, and establishment year, sorted from the oldest to the most recently established?
sql: SELECT SCHOOL_ID, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: Can you list the school category, management type, and establishment year for all schools in India, sorted from the oldest to the most recently established?
sql: SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: Can you list the unique school ID, management type, and establishment year for all schools, sorted from the oldest to the most recently established?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: Can you list all schools along with their management type and establishment year, sorted from the oldest to the most recently established?
sql: SELECT SCHOOL_ID, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: Can you list the school category, management type, and establishment year for all schools in India, sorted from the oldest to the most recently established?
sql: SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: Can you list the unique school IDs, management types, and establishment years for all schools with a known establishment year, sorted from the oldest to the most recently established?
sql: SELECT s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS l ON s.SCHOOL_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: Can you list the unique school IDs, management types, and establishment years for all schools that have a known establishment year, sorted from the oldest to the most recently established?
sql: SELECT s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY p ON s.SCHOOL_ID = p.POLITICAL_GEO_ID WHERE s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: What are the school category, management type, and establishment year for all schools with a known establishment year, sorted from the oldest to the newest?
sql: SELECT s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS l ON s.SCHOOL_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC;

question: List all schools in India along with their management type, establishment year, state, and location, ordered from the oldest to the newest established schools?
sql: WITH ranked_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID AS col_0, t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL AS col_1, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR AS col_2, t2.STATE AS col_3, t3.SCHOOL_LOCATION AS col_4, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC) AS rn FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.POLITICAL_GEO_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.LOCATION_ID WHERE t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, t2.STATE, t3.SCHOOL_LOCATION HAVING COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT col_0, col_1, col_2, col_3, col_4 FROM ranked_schools ORDER BY col_2 ASC

question: List all schools in Andhra Pradesh along with their unique school ID, category, establishment year, district, and gram panchayat name, ordered by establishment year from oldest to newest?
sql: WITH ranked_schools AS (SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID AS col_0, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY AS col_1, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR AS col_2, t2.DISTRICT AS col_3, t3.GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME AS col_4, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY ORDER BY t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC) AS rn FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.POLITICAL_GEO_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.LOCATION_ID WHERE t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL AND t2.STATE = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, t2.DISTRICT, t3.GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME HAVING COUNT(t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT col_0, col_1, col_2, col_3, col_4 FROM ranked_schools ORDER BY col_2 ASC

question: List all schools in South Andamans managed by the Department of Education, along with their school type, establishment year, assembly constituency, and city, ordered by establishment year from oldest to newest?
sql: WITH ranked_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID AS col_0, t1.SCHOOL_TYPE AS col_1, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR AS col_2, t2.ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME AS col_3, t3.CITY_NAME AS col_4, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t1.SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC) AS rn FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.POLITICAL_GEO_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.LOCATION_ID WHERE t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR IS NOT NULL AND t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND t2.DISTRICT = 'South Andamans' GROUP BY t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_TYPE, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, t2.ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME, t3.CITY_NAME HAVING COUNT(t1.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT col_0, col_1, col_2, col_3, col_4 FROM ranked_schools ORDER BY col_2 ASC

question: Which are the 5 oldest Department of Education managed schools that have special needs facilities for children and are accessible by all-weather roads, ordered by their establishment year?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC LIMIT 5;

question: Which are the 5 oldest Department of Education managed schools that have special needs facilities for children and are accessible by all-weather roads, ordered by their establishment year?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC LIMIT 5;

question: What are the unique school IDs, establishment years, and school types of the 5 oldest Department of Education-managed schools that provide special needs facilities for children and are accessible by all-weather roads, ordered by their establishment year?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_TYPE FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC LIMIT 5;

question: Which are the 5 oldest schools managed by the Department of Education that have both special needs facilities for children and all-weather road accessibility, listed in order of their establishment year?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_TYPE, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' ORDER BY si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC LIMIT 5;

question: Which are the 5 oldest schools managed by the Department of Education that have special needs facilities for children and are accessible by all-weather roads, ordered by their establishment year?
sql: WITH school_data AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON si.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS HAVING COUNT(si.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM school_data ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which are the 5 oldest schools managed by the Department of Education that have special needs facilities for children and are accessible by all-weather roads, along with their establishment years and school categories?
sql: WITH school_data AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY pg ON si.SCHOOL_ID = pg.POLITICAL_GEO_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS HAVING COUNT(si.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM school_data ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC LIMIT 5

question: What are the 5 oldest Department of Education managed schools in rural areas that provide special needs facilities for children, along with their establishment years and school types?
sql: WITH school_data AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_TYPE, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, la.SCHOOL_LOCATION FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS la ON si.SCHOOL_ID = la.LOCATION_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND la.SCHOOL_LOCATION = '1 - Rural' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, si.SCHOOL_TYPE, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN, la.SCHOOL_LOCATION HAVING COUNT(si.SCHOOL_ID) >= 1) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, SCHOOL_TYPE FROM school_data ORDER BY ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR ASC LIMIT 5

question: Which Department of Education schools are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities for children, but have not implemented CCE at the secondary level?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN ('1 - Department of Education') AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_SECONDARY = 'Not Available';

question: Which Department of Education schools are accessible by all-weather roads but do not have special needs facilities for children and have not implemented CCE at the secondary level?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN ('1 - Department of Education') AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' AND cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_SECONDARY = 'Not Applicable';

question: Which co-educational schools that are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities for children have not yet implemented CCE at the secondary level?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_TYPE FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('3 - Co-educational') AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_SECONDARY = 'Not Available';

question: How many Department of Education managed schools have CCE not implemented at secondary level but are accessible by all-weather roads and have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_SECONDARY = 'Not Available' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN ('1 - Department of Education', '1 - Department of Education') GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL

question: How many primary schools with upper primary, secondary, and higher secondary classes (1 to 12) have CCE not implemented at the secondary level, are accessible by all-weather roads, but do not have special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_SECONDARY = 'Not Available' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' AND si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY IN ('3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)', '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)') GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY

question: How many co-educational schools that are accessible by all-weather roads, have special needs facilities for children, but do not have CCE implemented at the secondary level, are there for each combination of school management type and school category?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('3 - Co-educational') AND cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_SECONDARY = 'Not Available' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS total_schools FROM filtered_schools GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY total_schools DESC

question: How many schools of each type and management category offer classes 1 to 12, have CCE not available at secondary level, are accessible by all-weather roads, but do not have special needs facilities for children?
sql: WITH filtered_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_TYPE, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY IN ('3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)') AND cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_SECONDARY = 'Not Available' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No') SELECT SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) AS total_schools FROM filtered_schools GROUP BY SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY total_schools DESC

question: Which types of school management have residential schools that do not provide any special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT i.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY i JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS o ON i.SCHOOL_ID = o.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE o.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND o.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' GROUP BY i.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN o.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;

question: Which school management types have exactly one residential school that does not provide special needs facilities for children?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN) = 1;

question: What are the distinct types of school management for residential schools in India that do not have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN != '1 - Yes';

question: What are the distinct management types of non-ashram government residential schools that do not have special needs facilities available for children?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN != '1 - Yes';

question: What are the distinct types of school management for residential schools that also provide special needs facilities for children in India?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN != '2 - No';

question: What are the different types of school management for schools that have special needs facilities available for children but where CCE (Continuous and Comprehensive Evaluation) implementation data is not available at the primary level?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cc ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cc.CCE_ID WHERE cc.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Available' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL

question: What are the different types of school management for schools where CCE implementation at primary level is not available and special needs facilities for children are not provided?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cc ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cc.CCE_ID WHERE cc.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Available' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL

question: What are the distinct types of school management for schools that have special needs facilities available for children but where CCE (Continuous and Comprehensive Evaluation) has not been implemented at the primary level?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cc ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cc.CCE_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE cc.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Available' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes';

question: What are the distinct types of school management for schools where CCE is not available at the primary level and special needs facilities for children are not provided?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cc ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cc.CCE_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE cc.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Available' AND so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No';

question: Which school management types (with more than one school) that have special needs facilities available for children also belong to management categories where CCE implementation data is not available at the primary level?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT si2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si2 JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si2.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Available') GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

question: Which school management types have more than one school that lacks special needs facilities for children and also belong to management types where CCE implementation is marked as 'Not Applicable' at the primary level?
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No' AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT si2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si2 JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si2.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Applicable') GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

question: Which school management types have schools that offer special needs facilities for children, and also belong to management types where CCE implementation at the primary level is marked as 'Not Applicable'? Show the management type along with the count of such schools.
sql: SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT si2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si2 JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si2.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Applicable') GROUP BY si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

question: Which school management types have more than one school where CCE implementation at the primary level is 'Not Available' and special needs facilities for children are available, and how many such schools are there for each management type?
sql: WITH cce_primary_schools AS (SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Available'), special_needs_schools AS (SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS ops ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ops.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE ops.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM cce_primary_schools) AND MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM special_needs_schools) GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY school_count DESC

question: Which school management types have schools where CCE is marked as 'Not Applicable' at the primary level and also lack special needs facilities for children, and how many such schools does each management type have?
sql: WITH cce_primary_schools AS (SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Applicable'), special_needs_schools AS (SELECT si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS ops ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ops.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE ops.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '2 - No') SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM cce_primary_schools) AND MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN (SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM special_needs_schools) GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY school_count DESC

question: Which school categories have more than one school where CCE implementation at the primary level is not available but special needs facilities for children are available, and how many schools fall into each such category?
sql: WITH cce_primary_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_CCE_IMPLEMENTATION cce ON si.SCHOOL_ID = cce.CCE_ID WHERE cce.CCE_IMPLEMENTED_PRIMARY = 'Not Available'), special_needs_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS ops ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ops.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE ops.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE SCHOOL_CATEGORY IN (SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM cce_primary_schools) AND SCHOOL_CATEGORY IN (SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM special_needs_schools) GROUP BY SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY school_count DESC

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either not managed by a minority community or are residential schools?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes';

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or operate as a non-ashram government residential school?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)';

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either not managed by a minority community or are not residential schools?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '2 - No';

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either not managed by a minority community or are residential schools?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes';

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or are non-ashram government residential schools?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)';

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either managed by the Department of Education or are non-residential?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '2 - No';

question: Which schools in India are either not managed by a minority community or have a residential or non-residential status recorded?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL IN ('1 - Yes', '2 - No') GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or are classified as non-ashram government or private residential school types?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', '3 - Private=3') GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either managed by the Department of Education or are non-ashram government residential schools or have no available residential school type information?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', 'Not Available') GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community, or are residential schools (whether private, non-ashram government, or otherwise designated as residential)?
sql: WITH col_0_set AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID HAVING COUNT(si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) >= 1), col_1_set AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('3 - Private=3', '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)') OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM col_0_set UNION SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM col_1_set ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community, or are non-residential/non-ashram type residential schools? Please list their unique school IDs.
sql: WITH col_0_set AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID HAVING COUNT(si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) >= 1), col_1_set AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', 'Not Available') OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM col_0_set UNION SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM col_1_set ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools are either managed by the Department of Education or are residential schools (private or otherwise), listed by their unique school IDs?
sql: WITH col_0_set AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID HAVING COUNT(si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) >= 1), col_1_set AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('3 - Private=3', 'Not Available') OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID) SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM col_0_set UNION SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM col_1_set ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools are not managed by a minority community? Show their unique school ID, school category, school type, and management details.
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No';

question: What are the school ID, category, type, and minority community management details for schools that are managed by the Department of Education?
sql: SELECT SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education';

question: What are the unique school IDs, school types, management details, and minority community management information for all co-educational schools in India?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational';

question: Which schools are not managed by a minority community? Show their unique school ID, category, type, and management details.
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No';

question: What are the school ID, category, type, and minority community management details for all schools managed by the Department of Education?
sql: SELECT SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education';

question: What are the unique school IDs, school types, management details, and minority community management information for schools that offer classes from 1 to 12 (Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary, and Higher Secondary)?
sql: SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)';

question: What are the unique school ID, category, type, and management details along with the count of schools that are not managed by a minority community?
sql: SELECT s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, s.SCHOOL_TYPE, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS l ON s.SCHOOL_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE s.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' GROUP BY s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, s.SCHOOL_TYPE, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What are the unique school ID, school category, school type, and minority community management details for all co-educational schools in India, along with the count of records for each group?
sql: SELECT s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, s.SCHOOL_TYPE, s.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS l ON s.SCHOOL_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE s.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' GROUP BY s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, s.SCHOOL_TYPE, s.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY;

question: What are the unique school IDs, school categories, and minority community management details for all schools managed by the Department of Education, along with the count of records for each group?
sql: SELECT s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY, COUNT(*) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS l ON s.SCHOOL_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, s.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY;

question: List all schools in India that are not managed by minority communities, along with their unique school ID, category, type, management details, state, district, city name, and gram panchayat name, sorted by state and district?
sql: WITH school_details_cte AS ( SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dpg.STATE, dpg.DISTRICT, dla.CITY_NAME, dla.GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY dpg ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dpg.POLITICAL_GEO_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS dla ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dla.LOCATION_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' ) SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, STATE, DISTRICT, CITY_NAME, GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME FROM school_details_cte GROUP BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, STATE, DISTRICT, CITY_NAME, GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY STATE, DISTRICT

question: What are the details of all schools in Andhra Pradesh managed by minority communities, including their school type, management type, district, school location, and gram panchayat name?
sql: WITH minority_school_cte AS ( SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dpg.STATE, dpg.DISTRICT, dla.SCHOOL_LOCATION, dla.GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY dpg ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dpg.POLITICAL_GEO_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS dla ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dla.LOCATION_ID WHERE dpg.STATE = 'Andhra Pradesh' ) SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, STATE, DISTRICT, SCHOOL_LOCATION, GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME FROM minority_school_cte GROUP BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY, SCHOOL_TYPE, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, STATE, DISTRICT, SCHOOL_LOCATION, GRAM_PANCHAYAT_NAME HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY STATE, DISTRICT

question: List all schools managed by the Department of Education along with their unique school ID, school category, minority community management status, district, assembly constituency, city, and municipality, ordered by district and assembly constituency.
sql: WITH school_mgmt_cte AS ( SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, dpg.DISTRICT, dpg.ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME, dla.CITY_NAME, dla.MUNICIPALITY_NAME FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_POLITICAL_GEOGRAPHY dpg ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dpg.POLITICAL_GEO_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS dla ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dla.LOCATION_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' ) SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, DISTRICT, ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME, CITY_NAME, MUNICIPALITY_NAME FROM school_mgmt_cte GROUP BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, DISTRICT, ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME, CITY_NAME, MUNICIPALITY_NAME HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1 ORDER BY DISTRICT, ASSEMBLY_CONSTITUENCY_NAME

question: What is the average working hours of teachers at primary, upper primary, and secondary levels, broken down by the management type of the school?
sql: SELECT d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY), AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID GROUP BY d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What is the average working hours for primary, upper primary, and secondary school teachers, broken down by school management type, for the year 2018?
sql: SELECT d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY), AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE f.YEAR = '2018' GROUP BY d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What are the average working hours for primary, upper primary, and secondary teachers in schools managed by the Department of Education?
sql: SELECT d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY), AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What are the average working hours for teachers at primary, upper primary, and secondary levels, broken down by the management type of the school?
sql: SELECT d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID GROUP BY d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What are the average working hours for teachers at the primary, upper primary, and secondary levels, broken down by school management type, for the year 2018?
sql: SELECT d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE f.YEAR = 2018 GROUP BY d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What are the average working hours for teachers at primary, upper primary, and secondary levels in schools managed by the Department of Education?
sql: SELECT d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What are the average working hours for teachers at primary, upper primary, and secondary levels, broken down by school management type and year in India?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.YEAR, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IS NOT NULL GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.YEAR ORDER BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What were the average working hours for teachers at primary, upper primary, and secondary levels across different school management types in 2018?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.YEAR, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IS NOT NULL AND ftom.YEAR = '2018' GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.YEAR ORDER BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What are the average working hours for primary, upper primary, and secondary school teachers in Department of Education managed schools, broken down by year?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.YEAR, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IS NOT NULL AND dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.YEAR ORDER BY dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL;

question: What are the average working hours for primary, upper primary, and secondary school teachers, broken down by school management type in India?
sql: WITH col_0_agg AS ( SELECT t2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.YEAR, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_3, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_4, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_col_5 FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID JOIN ( SELECT SCHOOL_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT YEAR) AS col_2_count FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS GROUP BY SCHOOL_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT YEAR) >= 1 ) sub ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = sub.SCHOOL_ID WHERE t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY IS NOT NULL AND t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY IS NOT NULL AND t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.YEAR ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(avg_col_3) AS overall_avg_primary_hours, AVG(avg_col_4) AS overall_avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(avg_col_5) AS overall_avg_secondary_hours FROM col_0_agg GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ASC

question: What are the overall average working hours for primary, upper primary, and secondary teachers in schools managed by the Department of Education across all years?
sql: WITH col_0_agg AS ( SELECT t2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.YEAR, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_3, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_4, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_col_5 FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID JOIN ( SELECT SCHOOL_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT YEAR) AS col_2_count FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS GROUP BY SCHOOL_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT YEAR) >= 1 ) sub ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = sub.SCHOOL_ID WHERE t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY IS NOT NULL AND t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY IS NOT NULL AND t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY IS NOT NULL AND t2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY t2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.YEAR ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(avg_col_3) AS overall_avg_primary_hours, AVG(avg_col_4) AS overall_avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(avg_col_5) AS overall_avg_secondary_hours FROM col_0_agg GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ASC

question: What are the average working hours for teachers at primary, upper primary, and secondary levels, broken down by school management type, for schools that cover classes 1 to 12 (Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary)?
sql: WITH col_0_agg AS ( SELECT t2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.YEAR, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_3, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_4, AVG(t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_col_5 FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID JOIN ( SELECT SCHOOL_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT YEAR) AS col_2_count FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS GROUP BY SCHOOL_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT YEAR) >= 1 ) sub ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = sub.SCHOOL_ID WHERE t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY IS NOT NULL AND t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY IS NOT NULL AND t1.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY IS NOT NULL AND t2.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' GROUP BY t2.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, t1.YEAR ) SELECT MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(avg_col_3) AS overall_avg_primary_hours, AVG(avg_col_4) AS overall_avg_upper_primary_hours, AVG(avg_col_5) AS overall_avg_secondary_hours FROM col_0_agg GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ASC

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education have an average working hours for primary teachers greater than 6, and what is their average working hours?
sql: SELECT s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON s.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY s.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6;

question: Which Department of Education schools have an average working hours for primary teachers greater than 6, and what is their average working hours?
sql: SELECT s.SCHOOL_ID, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON s.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY s.SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6;

question: What is the average working hours of primary teachers for each school category in schools managed by the Department of Education, but only for categories where the average exceeds 6 hours?
sql: SELECT s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY s JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON s.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE s.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY s.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6;

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education have primary teachers working more than 6 hours on average, and what are their unique school IDs and average working hours?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY > 6;

question: What are the school categories and average working hours of primary teachers for schools managed by the Department of Education where primary teachers work more than 6 hours on average?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY > 6;

question: Which co-educational schools have primary teachers working more than 6 hours on average, and what are their unique school IDs and average working hours?
sql: SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' AND ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY > 6;

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education have an average working hours for primary teachers greater than 6, and what is their average working hours?
sql: SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6;

question: What are the school categories under the Department of Education management where the average working hours of primary teachers exceeds 6 hours, and what is the average working hours for each of those categories?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6;

question: Which Department of Education schools have average working hours for primary teachers exceeding 6 hours, and what are their average working hours per year, sorted from highest to lowest?
sql: WITH col_0_avg AS ( SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t2.YEAR, AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.LOCATION_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t2.YEAR HAVING AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6 ) SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, YEAR, avg_hours FROM col_0_avg ORDER BY avg_hours DESC

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education, which school categories and years had average working hours for primary teachers exceeding 6 hours, and what were those average hours, sorted from highest to lowest?
sql: WITH col_0_avg AS ( SELECT t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t2.YEAR, AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.LOCATION_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t2.YEAR HAVING AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6 ) SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, YEAR, avg_hours FROM col_0_avg ORDER BY avg_hours DESC

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education, which establishment years and reporting years had average working hours for primary teachers exceeding 6 hours, and what were those average hours, sorted from highest to lowest?
sql: WITH col_0_avg AS ( SELECT t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, t2.YEAR, AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION_ADDRESS t3 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t3.LOCATION_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, t2.YEAR HAVING AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6 ) SELECT ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, YEAR, avg_hours FROM col_0_avg ORDER BY avg_hours DESC

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education, what is the average working hours of primary teachers in each school, grouped by their unique school ID, category, and type, ranked from highest to lowest average working hours?
sql: SELECT d.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, d.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, d.SCHOOL_TYPE, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY d.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, d.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, d.SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) DESC;

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education, what is the average working hours of primary teachers in each school, along with their school category and type, ranked from highest to lowest average working hours?
sql: SELECT d.SCHOOL_ID, d.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, d.SCHOOL_TYPE, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE d.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY d.SCHOOL_ID, d.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, d.SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) DESC;

question: For schools that cover Classes 1 to 12 (Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary), what is the average working hours of primary teachers for each school, grouped by school type, and ranked from highest to lowest average working hours?
sql: SELECT d.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, d.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, d.SCHOOL_TYPE, AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY d JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS f ON d.SCHOOL_ID = f.SCHOOL_ID WHERE d.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' GROUP BY d.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, d.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, d.SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY AVG(f.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) DESC;

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education, what is the average working hours of primary teachers, grouped by each school's unique ID, category, and type, ordered from highest to lowest average hours?
sql: SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY avg_primary_hours DESC;

question: For co-educational schools managed by the Department of Education, what is the average working hours of primary teachers in each school, grouped by school category and type, ordered from highest to lowest average hours?
sql: SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' GROUP BY dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY avg_primary_hours DESC;

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education that offer classes 1 to 12 (Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary), what is the average working hours of primary teachers for each school, broken down by school type, and ranked from highest to lowest average hours?
sql: SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' GROUP BY dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE ORDER BY avg_primary_hours DESC;

question: What are the unique school IDs, school categories, school types, and average working hours of primary teachers for schools managed by the Department of Education, sorted by average working hours of primary teachers in descending order?
sql: SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' ORDER BY ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY DESC;

question: What are the school category, type, establishment year, and average working hours of primary teachers for schools managed by the Department of Education, sorted by average working hours of primary teachers in descending order?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE, dsi.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' ORDER BY ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY DESC;

question: What are the unique school IDs, school categories, and management types of all co-educational schools in India, along with the average working hours of their primary teachers, sorted from highest to lowest working hours?
sql: SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' ORDER BY ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY DESC;

question: For schools managed by the Department of Education, what is the average working hours of primary teachers for each school, along with their school category and type, sorted from highest to lowest average working hours?
sql: WITH col_0_avg AS ( SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t1.SCHOOL_TYPE, AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_4 FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t1.SCHOOL_TYPE HAVING AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) IS NOT NULL ) SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, SCHOOL_TYPE, avg_col_4 FROM col_0_avg ORDER BY avg_col_4 DESC

question: For schools categorized as 'Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary (Classes 1 to 12)' that are managed by the Department of Education, what is the average working hours of primary teachers for each school, listed in descending order?
sql: WITH col_0_avg AS ( SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_4 FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID WHERE t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' AND t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' GROUP BY t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) IS NOT NULL ) SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, avg_col_4 FROM col_0_avg ORDER BY avg_col_4 DESC

question: For co-educational schools managed by the Department of Education, what is the average working hours of primary teachers at each school, along with their unique school ID and establishment year, ordered from highest to lowest average working hours?
sql: WITH col_0_avg AS ( SELECT t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_TYPE, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_col_4 FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.SCHOOL_ID WHERE t1.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND t1.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' GROUP BY t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t1.SCHOOL_TYPE, t1.ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR HAVING AVG(t2.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) IS NOT NULL ) SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_TYPE, ESTABLISHMENT_YEAR, avg_col_4 FROM col_0_avg ORDER BY avg_col_4 DESC

question: Which are the top 10 Department of Education schools with the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in the most recent year, along with their school category and management type?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(tm.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS tm ON si.SCHOOL_ID = tm.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND tm.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS) GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY avg_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 schools offering classes 1 to 12 (Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary) with the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in the most recent year, along with their management type?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(tm.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS tm ON si.SCHOOL_ID = tm.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' AND tm.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS) GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY avg_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 co-educational schools with the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in the most recent year, along with their school category and management type?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(tm.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS tm ON si.SCHOOL_ID = tm.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' AND tm.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS) GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY avg_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 Department of Education schools with the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in the most recent year, along with their school IDs and average hours?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND ftom.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS) GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY avg_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which top 10 schools managed by the Department of Education have the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in the most recent year, and what are their school categories?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND ftom.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS) GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY avg_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 schools that are classified as 'Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary (Classes 1 to 12)' and managed by the Department of Education, ranked by the highest average working hours of secondary teachers in the most recent year?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND ftom.YEAR = (SELECT MAX(YEAR) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS) GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL ORDER BY avg_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 Department of Education schools with the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in 2018, along with their school category and management type?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND ftom.YEAR = '2018' ORDER BY ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY DESC LIMIT 10;
