question: Which are the top 10 schools that offer classes from 1 to 12 (Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary), along with their management type, having the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in 2018?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' AND ftom.YEAR = '2018' ORDER BY ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 Department of Education managed schools offering classes 1 to 12 with the highest average working hours for secondary school teachers?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' ORDER BY ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 Department of Education schools with the highest average working hours for secondary school teachers in the most recent year?
sql: WITH latest_year AS (SELECT MAX(YEAR) AS max_year FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS), ranked_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN latest_year my ON ft.YEAR = my.max_year WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN ('1 - Department of Education') GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) IS NOT NULL) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, avg_secondary_hours FROM ranked_schools ORDER BY avg_secondary_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 Department of Education managed schools offering classes 1 to 12 with the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in the most recent year?
sql: WITH latest_year AS (SELECT MAX(YEAR) AS max_year FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS), ranked_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN latest_year my ON ft.YEAR = my.max_year WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN ('1 - Department of Education') AND si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY IN ('3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)') GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) IS NOT NULL) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, avg_secondary_hours FROM ranked_schools ORDER BY avg_secondary_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Which are the top 10 co-educational schools managed by the Department of Education with the highest average working hours for secondary teachers in the most recent year?
sql: WITH latest_year AS (SELECT MAX(YEAR) AS max_year FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS), ranked_schools AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) AS avg_secondary_hours FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN latest_year my ON ft.YEAR = my.max_year WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL IN ('1 - Department of Education') AND si.SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('3 - Co-educational') GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_ID, si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_SECONDARY) IS NOT NULL) SELECT SCHOOL_ID, UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, SCHOOL_CATEGORY, MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL, avg_secondary_hours FROM ranked_schools ORDER BY avg_secondary_hours DESC LIMIT 10;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers, grouped by school category, in Department of Education managed schools that are accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers, grouped by school category, in co-educational schools that are accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers, grouped by school category, in schools managed by the Department of Education that operate on a shift basis?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON ft.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.SCHOOL_USED_FOR_SHIFTS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers, grouped by school category, in schools managed by the Department of Education that are accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers, grouped by school category, in co-educational schools that are accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers across different school categories in non-residential schools managed by the Department of Education?
sql: SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '2 - No' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers, grouped by school category, in schools managed by the Department of Education that are accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = dsi.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dso.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY ORDER BY dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers, grouped by school category, in co-educational schools that are accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = dsi.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' AND dso.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY ORDER BY dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What is the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers, grouped by school category, in Department of Education managed schools that do not operate on shifts?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY), AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = dsi.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dso.SCHOOL_USED_FOR_SHIFTS = '2 - No' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY ORDER BY dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY;

question: What are the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers across different school categories, for Department of Education managed schools that are accessible by all-weather roads, ordered by primary teacher hours from highest to lowest?
sql: WITH school_avg AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ft.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(ft.TEACHER_METRIC_ID) > 0) SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, avg_primary_hours, avg_upper_primary_hours FROM school_avg ORDER BY avg_primary_hours DESC

question: What are the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers across different school categories, for co-educational schools managed by the Department of Education that are accessible by all-weather roads, ordered by primary teacher working hours from highest to lowest?
sql: WITH school_avg AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ft.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND si.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(ft.TEACHER_METRIC_ID) > 1) SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, avg_primary_hours, avg_upper_primary_hours FROM school_avg ORDER BY avg_primary_hours DESC

question: What are the average working hours for primary and upper primary teachers in Department of Education managed schools that offer classes 1 to 12 and are accessible by all-weather roads?
sql: WITH school_avg AS (SELECT si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) AS avg_primary_hours, AVG(ft.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_UPPER_PRIMARY) AS avg_upper_primary_hours FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ft ON si.SCHOOL_ID = ft.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND so.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes' AND si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' GROUP BY si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(ft.TEACHER_METRIC_ID) > 0) SELECT SCHOOL_CATEGORY, avg_primary_hours, avg_upper_primary_hours FROM school_avg ORDER BY avg_primary_hours DESC

question: Which residential schools are not managed by a minority community?
sql: SELECT OPERATIONS_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND OPERATIONS_ID NOT IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No');

question: Which Non-ashram (Govt.) residential schools are not managed by the Department of Education?
sql: SELECT OPERATIONS_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)' AND OPERATIONS_ID NOT IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education');

question: Which private residential schools (type 3 - Private) are managed by a minority community?
sql: SELECT OPERATIONS_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Private=3' AND OPERATIONS_ID NOT IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No');

question: What are the unique school IDs of residential schools in India that are managed by a minority community?
sql: SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND dsi.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY != '2 - No';

question: What are the school categories of non-ashram government residential schools that are managed by a minority community?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)' AND dsi.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY != '2 - No';

question: What is the management type of residential schools in India that are not co-educational?
sql: SELECT dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' AND dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE != '3 - Co-educational';

question: Which schools in India are residential and appear exactly once in the database? List their school IDs and unique school IDs.
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID HAVING COUNT(dsi.SCHOOL_ID) = 1;

question: Which schools are categorized as Non-ashram (Govt.) residential schools and appear exactly once in the database, along with their school categories?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY HAVING COUNT(dsi.SCHOOL_ID) = 1;

question: Which schools with residential facilities appear exactly once in the database, and what is their management type?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dso.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_ID, dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL HAVING COUNT(dsi.SCHOOL_ID) = 1;

question: Which residential schools in India are not managed by a minority community?
sql: WITH residential_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL HAVING COUNT(t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL) > 0) SELECT rs.SCHOOL_ID, rs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM residential_schools rs LEFT JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON rs.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID AND si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' WHERE si.SCHOOL_ID IS NULL ORDER BY rs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which residential schools in India are NOT managed by the Department of Education?
sql: WITH residential_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes' GROUP BY t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE HAVING COUNT(t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE) > 0) SELECT rs.SCHOOL_ID, rs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM residential_schools rs LEFT JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON rs.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' WHERE si.SCHOOL_ID IS NULL ORDER BY rs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which Non-ashram (Govt.) residential schools are NOT managed by a minority community (i.e., have no record indicating 'No' for minority community management)? List their School IDs and Unique School IDs, ordered by Unique School ID.
sql: WITH residential_schools AS (SELECT t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY t1 JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS t2 ON t1.SCHOOL_ID = t2.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE = '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)' GROUP BY t1.SCHOOL_ID, t1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID, t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE HAVING COUNT(t2.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE) > 0) SELECT rs.SCHOOL_ID, rs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM residential_schools rs LEFT JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON rs.SCHOOL_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID AND si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' WHERE si.SCHOOL_ID IS NULL ORDER BY rs.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education have special needs facilities for children and where primary teachers work more than 6 hours on average?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY > 6;

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education have special needs facilities for children and where the average working hours of primary teachers is more than 5.3 hours?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY > 5.3;

question: What are the unique school IDs of Department of Education managed schools that have special needs facilities for children and whose primary teachers work more than 6.3 hours on average?
sql: SELECT dsi.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY > 6.3;

question: Which Department of Education managed schools that have special needs facilities for children have their primary teachers working an average of more than 6 hours per day?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dsi.SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT OPERATIONS_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS WHERE AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes') GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6

question: Which Department of Education co-educational schools have an average working hours of primary teachers greater than 6 hours?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dsi.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6

question: Which Department of Education primary schools (Classes 1 to 12) have an average working hours of primary teachers greater than 6 hours?
sql: SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = ftom.SCHOOL_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dsi.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)' GROUP BY dsi.SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education that have special needs facilities for children also have primary teachers working an average of more than 6 hours per day?
sql: WITH col_0_set AS (SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes'), col_1_set AS (SELECT ftom.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = dsi.SCHOOL_ID GROUP BY ftom.SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6) SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM col_0_set WHERE SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM col_1_set) ORDER BY SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education that have special needs facilities for children also had primary teachers working an average of more than 6 hours per day in 2018?
sql: WITH col_0_set AS (SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes'), col_1_set AS (SELECT ftom.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = dsi.SCHOOL_ID WHERE ftom.YEAR = '2018' GROUP BY ftom.SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6) SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM col_0_set WHERE SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM col_1_set) ORDER BY SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools managed by the Department of Education that have special needs facilities for children and are accessible by all-weather roads also have primary teachers working an average of more than 6 hours per day?
sql: WITH col_0_set AS (SELECT dsi.SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS dso ON dsi.SCHOOL_ID = dso.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE dsi.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' AND dso.AVAILABILITY_OF_SPECIAL_NEEDS_FOR_CHILDREN = '1 - Yes' AND dso.APPROACHABILITY_BY_ALL_WEATHER_ROADS = '1 - Yes'), col_1_set AS (SELECT ftom.SCHOOL_ID FROM FACT_TEACHER_OPERATIONAL_METRICS ftom JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY dsi ON ftom.SCHOOL_ID = dsi.SCHOOL_ID GROUP BY ftom.SCHOOL_ID HAVING AVG(ftom.AVG_WORKING_HOURS_TEACHERS_PRIMARY) > 6) SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM col_0_set WHERE SCHOOL_ID IN (SELECT SCHOOL_ID FROM col_1_set) ORDER BY SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or have a residential/non-residential status recorded in the school operations data?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' UNION SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL IN ('1 - Yes', '2 - No')

question: Which schools are either managed by the Department of Education or are non-ashram government or private residential schools?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' UNION SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', '3 - Private=3')

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or are non-ashram (government) or have unavailable residential school type information?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' UNION SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si ON so.OPERATIONS_ID = si.SCHOOL_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', 'Not Available')

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or are of private or non-ashram government residential school types?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' UNION SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('3 - Private=3', '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)');

question: What are the unique school IDs of all schools that are managed by the Department of Education or have a residential/non-residential status recorded in their operations?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' UNION SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL IN ('1 - Yes', '2 - No');

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community or are non-ashram (government) or have no available information about their residential school type?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY WHERE MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' UNION SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', 'Not Available');

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either not managed by a minority community or are classified as private or non-ashram (government) residential schools, sorted by their unique school ID?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('3 - Private=3', '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)') ORDER BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either managed by the Department of Education or have a residential or non-residential status recorded in India's UDISE database?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL IN ('1 - Yes', '2 - No') ORDER BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: What are the unique school IDs of schools that are either co-educational or have a residential school type of 'Non-ashram (Govt.)' or 'Not Available', listed in order?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational' OR so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', 'Not Available') ORDER BY si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID;

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community and are under the Department of Education, or are residential schools of non-ashram government or private type? List their unique school IDs in ascending order.
sql: WITH cte_minority AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' AND si.MANAGEMENT_OF_THE_SCHOOL = '1 - Department of Education'), cte_residential AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', '3 - Private=3') AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes') SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_minority UNION SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_residential ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools are either co-educational schools not managed by a minority community, or residential schools of non-ashram (government) or unavailable type? List their unique school IDs in ascending order.
sql: WITH cte_minority AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' AND si.SCHOOL_TYPE = '3 - Co-educational'), cte_residential AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)', 'Not Available') AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '1 - Yes') SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_minority UNION SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_residential ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID

question: Which schools are either not managed by a minority community and cover classes 1 to 12, or are classified as private or non-ashram government residential school types but are not actually residential schools? List their unique school IDs in ascending order.
sql: WITH cte_minority AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE si.MANAGEMENT_BY_MINORITY_COMMUNITY = '2 - No' AND si.SCHOOL_CATEGORY = '3 - Primary with Upper Primary, Secondary and Higher Secondary ( Classes 1 to 12)'), cte_residential AS (SELECT si.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL_IDENTITY si JOIN DIM_SCHOOL_OPERATIONS so ON si.SCHOOL_ID = so.OPERATIONS_ID WHERE so.RESIDENTIAL_SCHOOL_TYPE IN ('3 - Private=3', '2 - Non-ashram (Govt.)') AND so.RESIDENTIAL_OR_NON_RESIDENTIAL = '2 - No') SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_minority UNION SELECT UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM cte_residential ORDER BY UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID
